---
title: "sprt.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/cstar/core/sprt.py"
loc: 37
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.38
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 3.56
overall_score: 4.60
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating evaluate_candidate. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [math](file://math)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `evaluate_candidate`
